title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.220 - October 16, Walt Disney — 'A Day to Dream' Day
text:
9.220.  October 16, Walt Disney — 'A Day to Dream' Day. — October sixteenth of each year shall be known and designated as "Walt Disney - 'A Day to Dream' Day".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to commemorate the life and accomplishments of Walt Disney.
(L. 2015 H.B. 874)
